creator: fracture@allusion.net
text:
On Wed, Jun 06, 2001 at 08:49:27PM +0300, Maxim Sobolev wrote:
> 
> You will be laughing, but I've already added it 30 minutes ago ;-), though I
> don't mind if you will take over maintainership. OK?
> 
> -Maxim
> 

Hah! That's pretty funny.

sure, I'll take over maintainership.  there are two things I figured I'd
mention right now though: first is that the md5 sum for the one you put
in is different (I had to fix one issue and had uploaded the wrong tar
to sourceforge: oops), and also I think it's probably a good idea to
install the sample.ledrc in the share/doc location, because otherwise
it's extreemly difficult to figure out how to get it to set up syntax
highlighting (that information isn't in the man page).

If you'd like, for simplicity, I can make a new PR with diffs against
the port in cvs for those changes.

-- 
Jordan DeLong
fracture@allusion.net
